data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the status timeline per conversion push.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the status timeline per conversion push, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or tracking of such a timeline. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any API reads or persisted state checks that would validate this requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of status timeline per conversion push.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
